title: not a dreamscape
description: A unique Vanilla+ modpack that I use on my streams. Vibrant visuals, plentiful mods and great optimization!
body:
This Vanilla+ modpack brings stunning visuals to your Minecraft, as seen on my streams. Highly requested, it's finally ready!

## Features

### Mods
- Graphics ([Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris), [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium), [Photonics](https://modrinth.com/mod/photonics))
- Optimization mods ([Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium), [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium), etc.)
- QOL mods ([Inventory Profiles Next](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventory-profiles-next), [FallingTree](https://modrinth.com/mod/FallingTree), [Resourcify](https://modrinth.com/mod/Resourcify), [InvMove](https://modrinth.com/mod/InvMove), etc.)
- Visual mods ([voxy](https://modrinth.com/mod/voxy), [First-person Model](https://modrinth.com/mod/first-person-model), etc.)
- Cozy mods ([Cool Rain](https://modrinth.com/mod/coolrain), [Sound Physics Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-physics-remastered), [Presence Footsteps](https://modrinth.com/mod/presence-footsteps), etc.)

### Resource Packs
- [Vanilla Mashup PBR](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/vanilla-mashup-pbr)
- [Clear Glass](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/clear-glass)
- [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations)
- [Fresh Food](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-food) | [Fresh Buckets](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-buckets) | [Fresh Flowers and Plants](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-flowers-and-plants)
- [Dark Smooth GUI](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/dark-smooth-gui)

### Shaders
- [Photon](https://modrinth.com/shader/photon-shader) [Beta](https://github.com/sixthsurge/photon)
- [Eclipse](https://github.com/Merlin1809/Eclipse-Shader)

***

### Catch this modpack on my streams
- [TikTok](https://tiktok.com/@itsnotmedylan)
- [Twitch](https://twitch.tv/itsnotmedylan)
